title: EvidenceScore
description:
Evidence-derived score for a single drug, computed from the aggregated evidence data produced by EvidenceAggregator.

Encapsulates total weighted score, source diversity, highest tier observed, composite confidence score, and per-source breakdown for full auditability.

total_weighted_score.description: Sum of all weighted evidence scores for this drug. Higher values indicate stronger aggregate evidence volume.

source_diversity.description: Ratio of distinct evidence sources to total items, in [0.0, 1.0]. Higher values indicate evidence from multiple independent sources, which increases confidence.

highest_tier.description: The best (highest) evidence tier observed across all evidence items for this drug. Typical values range from Tier_0 (strongest) to Tier_4 (weakest).

confidence_score.description: Composite confidence score in [0.0, 1.0] derived from a weighted combination of the normalised total weight and source diversity. Higher values reflect greater evidence reliability.

source_breakdown.description: Optional per-source breakdown of evidence contributions. Each key is a source name, and its value contains weight, tier, item count, and direction summary for that source.

sources.description: Mapping of source name → per-source summary.

total_weight.description: Sum of evidence weights from this source.

item_count.description: Number of evidence items from this source.

highest_tier.description: Highest evidence tier observed from this source.

directions.description: Distinct evidence directions observed from this source (supporting, resistance, conflicting, neutral, unknown).
